name: IDEFICS 80B
license: Mixed: MIT (new cross-attention/connector params) + LLaMA-65B non-commercial research license (frozen backbone) + MIT (CLIP-ViT-H/14 vision encoder)
archDisplay: Flamingo-style decoder: frozen CLIP-ViT-H/14 vision encoder + frozen LLaMA-65B LM connected via trained Perceiver-resampler cross-attention blocks
note: First open-access reproduction of DeepMind's Flamingo; interleaved image-text sequences via frozen CLIP-ViT-H/14 + frozen LLaMA-65B with trained cross-attention.
tpsNote: Custom Flamingo-style cross-attention architecture has no mainstream llama.cpp/GGUF conversion path; 80B dense at fp16 also exceeds a single 4090 regardless.

results.notes: 0-shot CIDEr, base IDEFICS-80B model (not -Instruct), from the official HF model card's full shot-count benchmark table

verificationNotes: Confirmed real Aug 2023 Hugging Face release. paramsB (80B), mixed license (MIT connector/vision + LLaMA-65B non-commercial backbone), and architecture all verified against the official HuggingFaceM4/idefics-80b model card. All 4 zero-shot result rows (VQAv2 60.0, TextVQA 30.9, OKVQA 45.2, COCO CIDEr 91.8) confirmed verbatim on that same card — no changes needed.
